allowed_assumptions: Markers do not span more than two lines.
constraints: Errors must reference character position in the original string.
Segments must be in order of appearance.
Do not raise exceptions for malformed input; report errors in the result.
expected_failure_modes: Raising exceptions instead of reporting errors.
prohibited_claims: Model superiority — not authorized by this task.
Wrapper improvement without paired comparison — not measured.
scoring_focus: Graceful error reporting for malformed input.
title: Parser-Like Transformation with Malformed Input
